Known Mahler Measures Less than 1.25

All known (multiplicative) Mahler measures M greater than 1 and less than
1.25 for primitive irreducible polynomials. Here d is the degree, v is the
number of roots outside the unit circle, and only the first d/2 + 1
coefficients are shown since these polynomials are reciprocal.

Michael Mossinghoff
m.mossinghoff@ccr-princeton.org
May 31, 2026

==========

Rank   d  M                v  Coefficients

  2   18  1.188368147508   1  1 1 1 1 0 0 -1 -1 -1 -1
